title: 妖怪ウォッチ ぷにぷに
subTitle: Puzzle/Match 3/Match 3 adventure/Casual/Hypercasual
desc:
That "Yokai Watch"
Turn it into a smartphone game with “Puni” and puzzles!
Everyone's favorite monsters such as Jibanyan and Koma-san
It has become a “Yokai Puni” with a pleasant squishy feeling ♪
Tap to erase, connect and make bigger!
The squishy feeling is addictive!
[How to play]
Clear the stage by defeating the enemy monsters that appear in each stage!
To attack, simply tap the "Yokai Puni" that falls from above to make it disappear.
When connected, it becomes “huge”!
Chance for big damage with fever and combos!
Each monster has a special move
Use them wisely to defeat your enemies.
When you defeat enemy monsters, you may become friends with them.
Let's collect many monsters and have fun!
